app.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
app.author: xnx
app.description: Google Chrome skills: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools
proposed_tests: Install Chrome Extension, create a new skill, test AI prompt
Verify Chrome Extension loads new skill, run with default query
Compare performance with existing tools like LangChain, CrewAI
